home.subtitle: Researcher, software engineer, environmental scientist
home.body: Welcome to my professional portfolio. I am a Research Engineer at LIP6 — Sorbonne Université and a recent graduate from Northeastern University, with a Bachelor's in Computer Science and Environmental and Sustainability Studies. I have benefitted from an intensive curriculum including 7 graduate courses and over 1.5 years of full-time internships. I have well-rounded expertise in full-stack development, machine learning, and user centric design. Through my professional work experience in research and software, I have published three first-author research papers and developed exceptional skills in communication, problem-solving, and attention to detail. Please use this portfolio to explore my work!
